evidence.snippet: The small size and light weight design of this rugged, high-performance GPS antenna versus similar GPS Passive antennas make it ideal for unmanned system, autonomous vehicles, and other automated or remote assets where antenna size needs to be minimized.

items.notes: GPS/GNSS antenna product line explicitly designed for UAV systems, unmanned ground vehicles, and autonomous vehicles.

The small size and light weight design of this rugged, high-performance GPS antenna versus similar GPS Passive antennas make it ideal for unmanned system, autonomous vehicles, and other automated or remote assets where antenna size needs to be minimized.

Our [magnetic mount kits](https://www.southwestantennas.com/products/antenna-mounting-kits/magnetic-mounts) are ideal for use with omni-directional antennas and can be secured to vehicles, unmanned ground systems, or ferromagnetic objects such as metal desks, metal plates and beams, or other surfaces.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Southwest Antennas designs and manufactures RF antennas and accessories sold as components to defense and unmanned systems integrators. They do not produce complete UAS platforms.

tagline: Designs and manufactures RF, GPS, and GNSS antennas plus associated RF components (LNAs, filters, isolators) for tactical communications and navigation on manned and unmanned platforms. Product portfolio spans concealment, MIMO, directional, and body-worn antennas, with mounting hardware for vehicles and aircraft. NDAA compliance status and any named defense programs not publicly disclosed; Blue UAS certification status unknown. In-production inventory suggests operational integration in UAV and radio systems, but detailed qualification pedigree and prime-contract footprint remain opaque in available sources.
